steps.t: The quartermaster can be found in the Rohirrim camp at the Ford of Isen. Grimbold subtly inferred a plan to allow Daervunn to escape, but you will hav…
The Dunlendings have a camp not too far from the Ford of Isen, where the stolen ale is being kept. You will need to fight your way into the Dunlending…
The Rohirrim quartermaster is at the Ford of Isen. You should return the ale-casks that you recovered to the quartermaster at Grimbold's encampment.
